test_strategy_covers_all_types.evidence: test-strategy.md covers unit (64 validation-rule tests), integration (18 cross-module tests), regression (177 existing debate tests). E2E/security/performance not applicable (prompt-verification project).

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.evidence: 87 test cases across 5 files cover all 7 FRs (FR-001..FR-007), all 34 ACs, and all 4 NFRs.

traceability_matrix_complete.evidence: test-traceability-matrix.csv has 87 rows mapping every test to requirements, ACs, NFRs, validation rules, modules, and error codes. 100% FR coverage (7/7), 100% AC coverage (34/34), 100% NFR coverage (4/4), 100% validation rule coverage (64/64).

coverage_targets_defined.evidence: test-strategy.md Section 4 defines: 100% FR coverage, 100% AC coverage, 100% NFR coverage, 100% validation rule coverage, 100% error code coverage, 0 regressions.

test_data_strategy_documented.evidence: test-strategy.md Section 5 documents test data sources (fs.readFileSync on .md files), path resolution, content caching, boundary conditions.

critical_paths_identified.evidence: test-strategy.md Section 6 identifies 5 critical paths: Critic Completeness, Refiner Completeness, Orchestrator Extension, Creator Awareness, Cross-Module Integrity.

error_codes_traced.note: 8 error codes directly traced to tests; remaining 16 are INFO/N/A severity handled by design, not testable at prompt level

constitutional_compliance.article_II_test_first: PASS -- All 87 tests designed before implementation (Phase 05 before Phase 06)
constitutional_compliance.article_VII_traceability: PASS -- test-traceability-matrix.csv maps every test to requirements with 100% coverage
